tool.name: OGS: identifySubdomains
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'identifySubdomains'.
tool.command: ln -s '$mesh' '$mesh.element_identifier'; ## Symlinks für Repeat subdomain_meshes_filenames #for $item in $subdomain_meshes_filenames_repeat ln -s '$item.element' '$item.element.element_identifier'; #end for identifySubdomains $force $searchlength: --searchlength '$searchlength' --mesh '$mesh.element_identifier' -- #for $item in $subdomain_meshes_filenames_repeat '$item.element.element_identifier' #end for --output_prefix 'new_'

param.name: searchlength
param.label: searchlength
param.help: search length determining radius for the node search algorithm. Non-negative floating point number (min = 0)

param.name: mesh
param.label: mesh
param.help: Input (.vtu). The file name of the bulk mesh

tool.help: This tool runs the **identifySubdomains** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
